release_notes: First stable-candidate release of Media Experiment Ledger Studio. RC.1 promotes localization and renderer quality from navigation-level support to an enforceable packaged product contract. Every supported route is exercised in Traditional Chinese, English, Simplified Chinese, Japanese and Korean at mobile and desktop viewports while preserving user-authored prompts, paths, report content and diagnostic payloads.
features: Five-locale product copy across the complete desktop route set
Exact-match localization boundary that never translates arbitrary user content
Route-specific language markers verified in packaged Windows, macOS and Linux applications
130 packaged route, locale and viewport checks on every supported operating system
Overflow, accessible-name, leaked-key and renderer-error release gates
Safe locale switching after asynchronous route initialization
All stable integration, recovery, report, detection, Atlas and automation foundations from beta.2
Four-platform release matrix with Windows installer and portable, macOS arm64 and x64, Linux AppImage and deb
SBOM, checksums, notices, source SHA, engine smoke and consolidated release evidence
